reviews.comment:
Hace tres semanas que está estación está trabajando sin darte factura o tiquets, no pueden cobrarte con ningún medio de pago electrónico. Increíble que los dejen seguir trabajando de esa manera

(Translated by Google)
This station has been operating for three weeks now without issuing receipts or invoices, and they can't accept any electronic payments. It's unbelievable that they're allowed to continue operating like this.

reviews.comment:
Nunca tienen sistema. Imposible pagar con QR de mercado pago y no te cargan los puntos de servi club.

(Translated by Google)
Their system is always down. It's impossible to pay with Mercado Pago QR codes, and they don't credit your Servi Club points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeXRTSFh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, estacion amplia y con sombra. Eso es muy importante cuando uno para un rato para despejarse de la ruta y no todas las estaciones tienen.
Al lado hay una parrilla del ACA, que según vimos no tiene buena calificación. Elegimos comer en otro lado
Cargamos combustible pero dijeron que no tienen sistema para emitir facturas. Deberían hacer manuales en ese caso, no es legal la manera en que venden. Aparte, no cargan los puntos en serviclub

(Translated by Google)
Good service, spacious station with shade. That's very important when you stop for a while to get away from the road, and not all stations have that.
Next door is an ACA grill, which, from what we saw, doesn't have a good rating. We chose to eat elsewhere. We filled up with fuel, but they said they don't have a system for issuing invoices. They should create manuals for that; the way they sell fuel isn't legal. Also, they don't credit Serviclub points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaXNyYWRBEAE

Good stop... My criticism is that on long weekends the store should have more staff, not just one person; it's worse than having to go to the bank... Queue after queue...

reviews.comment:
Baños chicos (solo un inodoro y dos orinales) canillas pileta de mano con pérdidas de agua. Revestimiento paredes rotos mal reparados. No tienen conectividad, no cobran con app de YPF, ni acumulan puntos Serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
Small bathrooms (only one toilet and two urinals), leaking faucets and hand basins. Broken wall tiles poorly repaired. No connectivity, no YPF app payments, and no Serviclub points.
